title: Photography
subtitle: Solo portraits · Nature · Pet sessions
about: Your story is Captured in a warm and natural light. I offer a relaxed shoot and can photograph families, couples, birthdays, pets and so much more!

testimonials.quote: The golden hour light was magical. We couldn't be happier with how the photos turned out.
testimonials.author: Emily R.

testimonials.quote: She was so patient with our dog — the photos are absolutely adorable.
testimonials.author: Jessica & Mark T.

testimonials.quote: Beautiful family photos we'll treasure. Relaxed, fun, and so easy to work with.
testimonials.author: Lauren & Michael S.
